detail.generationDurationFromAiLogs: Approx. generation time (first → last AI request): {duration}
detail.generationDurationInvalid: Cannot compute duration (completed time appears before created — legacy row). New completions will show correctly.
detail.downloadPdfAdminSuccessDesc: A4 imposition for spiral binding (short-edge duplex + trim).
detail.clearPdfConfirm: Delete this book’s stored PDF and the file in storage? The PDF will be regenerated on the next download.
detail.aiCostSubtitle: Estimated USD from OpenAI usage tokens and published rates; TTS from Google Cloud Gemini-TTS pricing (not your invoice).
detail.aiCostNoRequests: No AI request logs for this book yet.
detail.aiCostPartialNote: Some older runs may not have logged every step; totals can be incomplete.
detail.aiCostScope: Each row’s amount is derived from API usage in the response (or TTS model + text/audio estimate) and current published rate tables. Older books may be missing some steps.

edit.note: Note: To edit page content and images, use the user's Book Edit UI or update the DB directly. Title and status can be changed here.

hero.subtitle: Transform your child into the hero of their own adventure with AI-generated personalized storybooks. Beautifully illustrated tales that inspire imagination and create lasting memories.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Create your personalized storybook in just 3 simple steps

step1.title: Personalize Your Character
step1.description: Upload your child's photo and add their details (name, age, appearance)

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about HeroKidStory
faq.a0: It's simple! Upload your child's photo, choose a theme and style, and our AI creates a personalized storybook. You can download it as an e-book or order a printed hardcover version.
faq.q1: How long does it take to create a book?
faq.a1: E-books are ready within 2 hours. Printed books take 3-5 weeks for printing and delivery.
faq.a2: Yes! You can choose from various themes (adventure, fairy tale, science fiction, etc.) and select your child's age group. The AI tailors the story accordingly.
faq.a3: Our books are designed for children aged 0-2, 3-5, 6-9, and 10+ years. The content and complexity are adjusted based on the selected age group.
faq.a4: Yes, you can upload up to 5 character photos per book. These can include your child, family members, pets, or toys.
faq.a5: E-books are available as PDF files for instant download. Printed books come as hardcover, A4 format (21x29.7 cm) with high-quality printing.
faq.a6: We use secure encryption and follow strict privacy policies. Your photos are used solely for creating your personalized book and are not shared with third parties.
faq.a7: Yes, we offer a money-back guarantee. If you're not satisfied with your e-book, contact us within 30 days for a full refund.
faq.a8: Yes! We ship printed books to over 26 countries worldwide. Shipping times vary by location (typically 3-5 weeks).
faq.a9: Yes! You can order multiple copies of the same book. We offer discounts for orders of 3 or more books.
